JetBrains dotCover Console Runner 2026.1. Build 20260329.160924 (linux-x64)
Copyright (c) 2009–2026 JetBrains s.r.o. All rights reserved.

Command not recognized.

Usage: dotCover <command> [<parameters>]
Type 'dotCover help <command>' for help on a specific command

Available commands:
  cover         Run coverage analysis on a specified application or test project
  merge         Combine multiple coverage snapshots into one
  report        Generate a coverage report from a snapshot
  version       Write the current dotCover version to a file
  help          Show help for dotCover commands

Additional help topics:
  exit-codes    Meaning of the default exit codes
